findings.title: Path mismatch causes test/implementation divergence
findings.description: _load_skill_frontmatter reads P:/.claude/skills/{skill}/SKILL.md while _validate_skill_frontmatter reads STATE_DIR/skills/{skill}/SKILL.md. Tests patch STATE_DIR but not hardcoded P:/.claude/skills path.

evidence.code_excerpt: skill_dir = Path(P:/.claude/skills) vs skill_dir = STATE_DIR / skills
evidence.proof: Tests only test _validate_skill_frontmatter in isolation. Never test full set_skill_loaded() flow.

impact.business_consequence: Validation uses wrong path at runtime, bypassing checks

recommendation.action: Add integration test patching both STATE_DIR and P:/.claude/skills paths
recommendation.code_fix: Test set_skill_loaded() with both paths mocked

findings.title: No consumer test for frontmatter_warnings
findings.description: frontmatter_warnings written to ledger but no hook/router reads them. Tests only verify WRITE to ledger. Success theater - tests pass but warnings never reach users.

evidence.code_excerpt: grep frontmatter_warning in hooks -> only state artifact, no consumer
evidence.proof: Test verifies append_event was called but never verifies any consumer reads and displays warnings

impact.business_consequence: Advisory warnings never displayed to developer

recommendation.action: Add integration test verifying frontmatter_warnings appear in user output
recommendation.code_fix: Test loads skill with missing fields and verifies warning reaches user

findings.title: Early-return gate may suppress warnings
findings.description: Lines 358-365: if not required_tools and not allowed_first_tools: if not frontmatter_warnings and not frontmatter: return. Skill with frontmatter_warnings but no required_tools still returns early.

evidence.code_excerpt: if not required_tools and not allowed_first_tools: if not frontmatter_warnings and not frontmatter: return
evidence.proof: No test for skill WITH frontmatter_warnings but no required_tools.

impact.business_consequence: Knowledge skills with missing frontmatter do not write state

recommendation.action: Add test: skill with frontmatter_warnings AND no required_tools
recommendation.code_fix: Test skill with missing version but no required_tools

findings.title: Silent exception handling masks YAML failures
findings.description: Lines 218-219 and 274-275 use bare except Exception: pass. Tests cannot distinguish no frontmatter from YAML crash.

evidence.proof: Tests only check expected warning strings. YAML crash silently returns empty list.

findings.title: test_skill_execution_state.py is a stub
findings.description: Only smoke test exists. Critical functions transition_phase, record_tool_use, mark_first_tool_validated have no tests.

evidence.code_excerpt: assert skill_execution_state is not None; # TODO: Add more tests

impact.business_consequence: Core state management has no regression protection

recommendation.action: Expand tests for transition_phase, record_tool_use, clear_state
recommendation.code_fix: Add tests for state transitions and tool recording

findings.title: Empty required_tools registry warning path untested
findings.description: Lines 342-351: skill in registry with empty required_tools writes warning to stderr. No test verifies this.

evidence.code_excerpt: if skill_lower in registry and not required_tools: sys.stderr.write(warning_msg)
evidence.proof: No test patches _get_skill_execution_registry with empty required_tools

recommendation.action: Add test patching registry with empty required_tools
recommendation.code_fix: Test empty required_tools warning appears in stderr

findings.title: No end-to-end advisory system test
findings.description: No test loads skill with missing fields and verifies warning is visible. All tests are unit-level.

evidence.code_excerpt: Pre-mortem R1: No hook/router reads frontmatter_warnings and surfaces it
evidence.proof: Zero tests verify warnings reach user

impact.business_consequence: Advisory feature tested for internal API only

recommendation.action: Design which hook surfaces warnings, add integration test

summary.primary_concern: Producer-only problem confirmed: tests verify warnings written but no test verifies consumer reads them.
summary.critical_gap: TEST-COVERAGE-02 is most critical: 11 tests pass but only test write side.
summary.path_bug_confirmed: TEST-COVERAGE-01 confirms path mismatch not caught by tests.
summary.brittle_tests: Tests mock STATE_DIR but not hardcoded P:/.claude/skills path.

handoff.coverage_assessment: Unit-level producer-side coverage adequate. Consumer-side coverage ZERO.
